calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Simon R. Goodfellow, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Granite Racing Ltd., a Montana limited liability company.
Joe Cassidy and Glen Wilson, principals for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
Defaults were entered as to defendants Rob Quells and Speedtek Composite Fabrication, Inc., an Arizona corporation, on January 27, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 22, 2010.
Dismissals with prejudice as to defendants Ellison Race Concepts, an unknown business entity and Dan Ellison, were filed on January 22, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Ledger, spreadsheets, invoices and photographs---------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Granite Racing Ltd., a Montana limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendants Rob Quells and Speedtek Composite Fabrication, Inc., an Arizona corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $385,000.00.
Costs - $1,193.75, for a total judgment in the amount of $386,193.75.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Continued To Jun-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-25-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Continued To Dec-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
